stories.title: Kidd out as Mavericks coach after five seasons
stories.summary: Jason Kidd is out as the Mavericks' head coach despite four years and $40 million remaining on his contract, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Chiefs' Rice violates probation, ordered to jail
stories.summary: Chiefs receiver Rashee Rice has been sentenced to immediately serve 30 days in jail after testing positive for marijuana in violation of the terms of his probation.

stories.title: Arsenal win 1st PL title in 22 years after City dr...
stories.summary: Arsenal have been crowned Premier League champions for the first time in 22 years after Manchester City failed to beat Bournemouth on Tuesday.

stories.title: NFL set to up int'l slate; games can't be protecte...
stories.summary: NFL owners Tuesday approved the ability to play up to 10 international games per season, starting in 2027, and will no longer allow teams to protect opponents from international scheduling.

stories.title: Bills WR Coleman calls this year 'make or break'
stories.summary: Embattled Bills wide receiver Keon Coleman called his third season in the NFL "make or break."
